sevenDayForecast.headline: A Low chance of redevelopment of Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji from next weekend off the northwest WA coast.
points: Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji is forecast to continue to move west and then northwest this week, through the Gulf Country in Queensland and then potentially further west.

The most likely scenario is that Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji will continue moving west through the Northern Territory and towards the Kimberley coast in Western Australia, where it has a Low chance of moving over water and developing from next weekend.
It is possible, though less likely, that Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji will linger in the Gulf Country in Queensland and potentially move over the Gulf of Carpentaria waters.
